SQLLite.SQL: SELECT C.RV_LOW_VALUE AS "Status", ( SELECT NVL(SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED), 0) FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS = C.RV_LOW_VALUE ) AS "AmountAllowed", ( ( SELECT NVL(SUM(P.AMOUNT), 0) FROM PAYMENTS P, ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE P.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND P.SUBJECT_NO = ${param.coNumber} AND P.ALD_DEBT_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND AD.DEBT_STATUS = C.RV_LOW_VALUE ) + ( SELECT NVL(SUM(D.DD_AMOUNT), 0) FROM DEBT_DIVIDENDS D, ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE D.DD_ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS = C.RV_LOW_VALUE ) ) AS "PaidToDate" FROM CCBC_REF_CODES C WHERE C.RV_DOMAIN = 'ALLOWED_DEBTS.DEBT_STATUS'

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
